Travelers (TRV) Q4 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
items.description: The headline numbers for Travelers (TRV) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended December 2025, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

items.title: Travelers (TRV) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
items.description: Travelers (TRV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +31.72% and +0.30%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: The Travelers Companies Inc (TRV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Underwriting and ...
items.description: The Travelers Companies Inc (TRV) reports robust Q4 2025 results with significant gains in core income and shareholder returns, despite challenges in the personal insurance sector.

items.title: Moderna and Merck pop on cancer vaccine, Lucid-Rockwell partnership
items.description: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Travelers Companies' (TRV) fourth quarter earnings results, Moderna (MRNA) and Merck (MRK) shares popping on skin cancer vaccine trial results, and Lucid (LCID) surging on its partnership with Rockwell Automation powering its EV facility in Saudi Arabia. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
